# CWE-613: Insufficient Session Expiration (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-613-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"time"
)

var revokedSessions = map[string]struct{}{}

// Vulnerable: session cookie never expires and logout does not invalidate server-side state.
func LoginHandler(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	sid := r.FormValue("session_id")
	http.SetCookie(w, &http.Cookie{Name: "sid", Value: sid, Path: "/", HttpOnly: true})
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}

func LogoutHandler(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	http.SetCookie(w, &http.Cookie{Name: "sid", Value: "", Path: "/", MaxAge: -1, HttpOnly: true})
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}

func ProtectedHandler(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	c, err := r.Cookie("sid")
	if err != nil || c.Value == "" {
		http.Error(w, "unauthorized", http.StatusUnauthorized)
		return
	}
	_ = time.Now()
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	_, _ = w.Write([]byte(`{"data":"secret"}`))
}
